mapper.select:
SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.realm, r.description, r.data_type, r.create_time, COALESCE(uc.cnt, 0) as user_count FROM manager_role r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT role_id, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as cnt FROM manager_user_role GROUP BY role_id ) uc ON r.role_id = uc.role_id
AND (r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR r.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.create_time
